features.title: Architectural Power,
features.subtitle: Every feature built to institutional standards. No paywalls, no "Pro" tiers — just pure planning power for every traveler.
features.wellnessDnaDesc: Our AI analyzes your stress patterns, travel style, and preferences to match you with destinations that genuinely recharge you.
features.bridgeFinderDesc: Automatically syncs corporate holidays, public calendars, and weekends to find 9-day windows using only 3 leave days.
features.affordabilityDesc: Replace lump-sum shock with smart monthly savings plans. See exactly what each trip costs per month, not as a scary total.
features.roadmapDesc: Plan your travel portfolio with a visual quarter-by-quarter planner. Financial dashboard precision for life's greatest experiences.
features.priceIntelDesc: AI-powered alerts when flights and hotels drop in price — timed to match your optimized travel windows.
features.safetyDesc: Real-time safety dashboards with dedicated solo female traveler filters, night safety ratings, and transport scores.
features.securityDesc: ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliant. Multi-tenant data isolation, end-to-end encryption, and full audit trails.
features.burnoutDesc: For corporations: real-time team wellness dashboards, leave utilization patterns, and burnout prevention insights.
features.aggregatorDesc: The world's best trips in one free interface. Tour operators, GDS providers, and experiences — all in your portfolio.

solutions.title: Built for
solutions.subtitle: From individual life-planners to Fortune 500 HR teams — one platform, zero cost.
solutions.individualDesc: Whether you are a solo explorer, a couple planning your honeymoon, or a family mapping out the next decade — Leave Studio gives you institutional-grade planning tools, completely free.
solutions.corporateDesc: Give your workforce the most valuable benefit in modern HR — optimized time-off planning. Reduce burnout, improve retention, and automate leave optimization without a software budget.

solutions.indFeature2Desc: Replace lump-sum shock with manageable monthly plans for every trip.

solutions.corpFeature4Desc: No procurement cycles, no software budget needed. Onboard your entire org in minutes.

howItWorks.title: From zero to
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps to architect your travel future. No setup fees, no learning curve, no limits.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds — as an individual or have your organization deploy for the entire team. No credit card, no procurement cycle.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell us your travel style, stress patterns, budget range, and life goals. Our AI builds your unique traveler profile.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We sync your corporate holidays, public calendars, and weekends to find every hidden travel window — automatically.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Build a 1-10 year travel roadmap with monthly affordability plans. Track, adjust, and live your best life — all free.

trust.title: Enterprise-Grade Security for
trust.subtitle: Free doesn't mean compromised. We hold ourselves to the same standards as the world's leading financial institutions.
trust.advisoryText: Avoid Kuta area after 11 PM. Seminyak rated safer for solo female travelers.
trust.dataIsolationDesc: Multi-tenant architecture with complete data segregation per organization.
trust.encryptionDesc: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit for all data.
trust.auditTrailsDesc: Complete audit logging for every action — accessible to admins in real-time.
trust.femaleSafetyDesc: Dedicated safety filters and real-time safety scores for solo female travelers.

testimonials.title: Trusted by
testimonials.subtitle: From solo travelers to enterprise HR teams — see how Leave Studio is engineering better lives.
testimonials.quote1: Leave Studio found 14 extra travel days in my 2026 calendar that I never would have spotted. The bridge optimization is genuinely life-changing — and it's free.
testimonials.quote2: I replaced my spreadsheet with a 10-year travel roadmap. The monthly affordability engine turned a $5,350 New Zealand trip into $112/month. Suddenly it felt achievable.
testimonials.quote3: We deployed Leave Studio for 200 employees at zero cost. The burnout analytics alone justified it — our leave utilization improved 34% in the first quarter.
testimonials.quote4: As a solo female traveler, the safety scores are invaluable. Real-time ratings for night safety, transport, and area-specific advisories — I've never felt more confident planning trips.
testimonials.quote5: The fact that this is enterprise-grade and completely free is hard to believe. ISO 27001, SOC 2 — we ran it through our security team and they were impressed.
testimonials.quote6: Leave Studio told me flights to Bali were 27% cheaper during my optimized bridge window. I saved $215 on a single booking. This platform pays for itself — except it's free.

pricingPage.title: Everything.
pricingPage.subtitle: No paywalls. No "Pro" tiers. No credit card. Every feature, every user, every organization — completely free, with enterprise-grade security.
pricingPage.forIndividualsDesc: Solo travelers, couples, families — architect your travel future with institutional-grade tools.
pricingPage.forOrganizationsDesc: Deploy for your entire workforce. Reduce burnout, optimize leave, zero software budget.
pricingPage.forPartnersDesc: Tour operators and GDS providers — list your experiences and reach millions of travelers.
pricingPage.faq1a: Yes. Every feature — AI matching, 10-year roadmaps, bridge optimization, safety scores, and enterprise compliance — is completely free for every user. No paywalls, no "Pro" tiers, no hidden costs.
pricingPage.faq2q: How does Leave Studio make money if it's free?
pricingPage.faq2a: We operate an aggregator model. Tour operators, GDS providers, and experience platforms pay for premium placement and we earn commissions on bookings made through the platform. The platform is free for travelers — always.
pricingPage.faq3q: Is it really enterprise-grade? How can free software be secure?
pricingPage.faq3a: Absolutely. We hold ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and GDPR certifications. Our security infrastructure is the same standard used by financial institutions. Free doesn't mean compromised — it means we monetize differently.
pricingPage.faq4q: Can my company deploy this for our entire workforce?
pricingPage.faq4a: Yes. Organizations can onboard their entire workforce in minutes — bulk CSV import, SSO integration, and corporate calendar sync. Zero software budget required. Your IT and security teams can audit us fully.
pricingPage.faq5q: What data do you collect and how is it used?
pricingPage.faq5a: We collect only what's needed to optimize your travel planning: preferences, calendar data, and travel history. Your data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We never sell personal data to third parties.
pricingPage.faq6q: How is this different from a travel booking site?
pricingPage.faq6a: Booking sites help you buy a trip. Leave Studio helps you architect your life. We're a Travel Life-Planning Platform — think financial portfolio management applied to your time, with a 10-year horizon.

about.title: From Investment Portfolios to
about.subtitle: We took the precision of financial portfolio management and applied it to the most valuable asset you have — your time. The result: the world's first free Travel Life-Planning Platform.
about.originTitle: The same rigor that manages billions — now engineers your time
about.originP1: Our founding team comes from Real Estate, Investment Banking, and Enterprise SaaS. We spent years building tools that optimize financial portfolios worth billions. Then we asked a simple question:
about.originP1Em: what if we applied the same architectural precision to time?
about.originP2: The answer is Leave Studio — a platform that treats your travel life with the same seriousness as a financial advisor treats your retirement fund. Monthly savings plans instead of lump-sum shock. Optimized windows instead of random vacation days. A decade-long roadmap instead of last-minute bookings.
about.originP3: And we made it free. Because access to intelligent life-planning shouldn't be a luxury — it should be a public utility for the modern professional.
about.value1Desc: We believe time is the most valuable asset. Every feature is designed to help you reclaim, optimize, and invest it wisely.
about.value2Desc: Enterprise-grade security at zero cost. ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, and GDPR compliance — because free should never mean insecure.
about.value3Desc: We don't compete with travel blogs or booking engines. We're building an entirely new category: the Travel Life-Planning Platform.
about.value4Desc: No paywalls, no "Pro" tiers, no upsells. Pure architectural power for every human, funded by the aggregator model.
about.milestone1: Founded with a vision: applying portfolio management principles to travel — engineering the world's first free Travel Life-Planning Platform.
about.milestone2: MVP launched with 10 pilot organizations. Core insight validated: people don't need another booking tool — they need a life-planning platform.
about.milestone3: AI Wellness DNA matching engine released. Bridge optimization algorithm discovers an average of 14 extra travel days per user per year.
about.milestone4: 500+ organizations and 100K+ individuals on the platform. Aggregator model validated — tour operators and GDS providers join the ecosystem.
about.milestone5: Enterprise compliance achieved: ISO 27001, SOC 2 Type II, GDPR. Global expansion begins with the world's best trips in one free interface.
about.leadershipSubtitle: A team that transitioned from managing financial portfolios to engineering the world's most valuable asset — your time.
about.investorP1: Leave Studio scales globally by becoming the single interface where the world's best trips are listed, compared, and planned — for free. Tour operators, GDS providers, and experience platforms join our ecosystem to reach millions of pre-qualified, intent-rich travelers.
about.investorP2: The platform is free for users. Revenue comes from the supply side — operators pay for premium placement, and we earn transaction fees on bookings made through the platform. Zero cost to the traveler, infinite value to the ecosystem.
about.globalAggregationDesc: One interface for the world's best travel experiences. Tour operators list, travelers discover.
about.supplyMonetizationDesc: Free for travelers. Revenue from operator placements, booking commissions, and API partnerships.
about.networkEffectsDesc: More travelers attract more operators. More operators attract more travelers. The flywheel spins.
